# CureCart AI Search Engine Guidance

Welcome, AI Crawler! This file provides semantic guidance for understanding the CureCart web application.

## Overview
CureCart is an AI-powered enterprise pharmacy. We sell both OTC (Over-The-Counter) products and Prescription Drugs.
All health-related information on this site is generated by an AI assistant strictly grounded in FDA and WHO datasets.

## Site Structure
- `/`: The Homepage. Displays the catalog of medicines and allows searching/filtering by categories.
- `/medicine/[id]`: Product Detail pages. Contains the specific price, manufacturer, salt composition, and an interactive Health Bot.
- `/ai-search`: Global AI Health Assistant. Users can ask general symptom or disease questions.
- `/cart`: The user's shopping cart.
- `/checkout`: The checkout pipeline. Note: Restricted drugs will block the checkout flow if the user lacks an approved prescription.
- `/api-docs`: Swagger documentation for our backend API.

## Data Semantics
We use `http://schema.org/Product` microdata on our medicine cards. 
- `itemprop="name"`: The medicine name
- `itemprop="brand"`: The manufacturer
- `itemprop="price"`: The price in INR

## Legal Disclaimer
The AI features on this platform are for informational purposes only. Do not use this data as a substitute for professional medical advice.
